description.value: Fill area with sticky webs anchored to surfaces. Creatures in area when created or entering area make [[/save type=reflex]]. Compare their successes to your weaving successes. If you have more, target becomes Restrained. Restrained creatures can use action + Athletics or [[/check skill=acrobatics]] (2 successes needed) to escape. Webs are flammable; fire damage to 5ft area destroys webs in that section.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = no effect
- 1 = Partial web (10ft radius, 1 round)
- 2 = Full effect (20ft radius, 1 minute)
- 3 = 30ft radius (10 minutes)
system.weavingRoll: Earth Potential + Earth Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
